title: Interference term has limited modulation range
description: The interference term |1 + ε·exp(iΦ)| can only modulate the envelope by a factor of (1+ε)/(1-ε). For typical ε=0.3, this is only 1.86x. This is insufficient to create the ~136x ratio needed for mt/mc.

title: fix_svd_phases breaks SVD reconstruction
description: The fix_svd_phases function introduces a reconstruction error of 5.10e-01. This may affect CKM matrix extraction. The function modifies U rows and Vh columns independently, which breaks the U @ S @ Vh = Y relationship.

title: Third left-handed position hardcoded to 0
description: In kernel.py line 47, left_vec[2] is always set to 0, ignoring the third element of Q. This may be intentional (Q is a doublet with only 2 generations), but it limits the model's flexibility. The third row of the Yukawa matrix always uses position 0.

title: Parameter sigma frequently hits boundary
description: sigma is at lower bound 0.0% of the time and at upper bound 36.0% of the time. Consider widening the bounds.

title: Parameter eps_u frequently hits boundary
description: eps_u is at lower bound 40.7% of the time and at upper bound 3.6% of the time. Consider widening the bounds.
